title: Guidewire Announces Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
body: Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE)
Fiscal quarter ended April 30, 2026
Financial results announcement

title: Presentation Overview
body: Q3 FY2026 performance highlights and executive commentary
Revenue growth across subscription, services, and ARR metrics
Profitability improvements in GAAP and non-GAAP measures
Liquidity position and share repurchase activity
Q4 FY2026 guidance and updated full-year outlook

title: CEO Perspective: Business Momentum
body: Mike Rosenbaum, chief executive officer: "Third-quarter results reinforce our confidence in the strength and continuing momentum of our business, and set us up well for what should be a record fourth quarter"
Strategy and market position resonating with insurers focusing on modernizing core systems
Insurers migrating critical business functions to cloud platform solutions
Adoption of AI across applications driving customer engagement

title: CFO Perspective: Raised Outlook
body: Jeff Cooper, chief financial officer: "We are raising our fiscal year outlook for revenue, operating income, and cash flow based on better than expected Q3 results and greater visibility as opportunities progress through our pipeline"
ARR grew 19% in Q3
Total revenue grew 27%

title: Q3 Total Revenue Performance
body: Total revenue was $372.5 million
Increase of 27% year over year
Record third quarter driven by strength across revenue streams

title: Q3 Subscription and Support Revenue
body: Subscription and support revenue was $244.7 million
Increase of 35%
Strongest growth driver reflecting cloud platform adoption

title: Q3 License Revenue
body: License revenue was $56.0 million
Decrease of 2%
Reflects ongoing transition to subscription model

title: Q3 Services Revenue
body: Services revenue was $71.8 million
Increase of 32%
Strong professional services demand supporting customer implementations

title: Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) Growth
body: ARR reached $1,147 million at end of Q3 FY2026
Up from $1,041 million at the end of fiscal year 2025
19% growth rate demonstrating subscription business strength

title: Q3 GAAP Profitability Improvement
body: GAAP operating income was $30.6 million, compared to $4.5 million in the same quarter a year ago
GAAP net income was $16.5 million, compared to $46.0 million in the prior-year quarter
GAAP diluted earnings per share of $0.19 versus $0.54

title: Q3 Non-GAAP Profitability Performance
body: Non-GAAP operating income was $77.8 million, compared to $46.1 million
Non-GAAP net income was $69.6 million, compared to $47.4 million
Non-GAAP diluted earnings per share of $0.82 versus $0.55

title: Liquidity and Cash Position
body: Cash, cash equivalents, and investments totaled $1,146.8 million
Compared with $1,483.2 million at the end of fiscal year 2025
Decrease reflects capital allocation to share repurchases and operations

title: Q3 Share Repurchase Activity
body: Company repurchased 1,696,180 shares during the quarter
Average price of $147.07 per share
$240.5 million remaining under the repurchase authorization

title: Q4 FY2026 ARR and Revenue Guidance
body: Ending ARR expected at $1,229 to $1,237 million
Subscription and support revenue expected at $259 to $265 million
Total revenue expected at $396 to $406 million

title: Q4 FY2026 Profitability Guidance
body: GAAP operating income expected at $36 to $46 million
Non-GAAP operating income expected at $86 to $96 million
Anticipating record fourth quarter performance

title: Updated Full Year FY2026 Revenue Outlook
body: Subscription and support revenue expected at $963 to $969 million
Total revenue expected at $1,460 to $1,470 million
Raised guidance reflects better than expected Q3 results and pipeline visibility

title: Updated Full Year FY2026 Profitability and Cash Flow Outlook
body: GAAP operating income expected at $124 to $134 million
Non-GAAP operating income expected at $314 to $324 million
Operating cash flow expected at $365 to $380 million
Improved outlook across all profitability and cash flow metrics

title: Fiscal Year 2026 Outlook: Strength and Momentum
body: Strong Q3 results establishing foundation for record Q4
Cloud platform and AI adoption driving customer modernization initiatives
Raised full-year guidance reflecting business momentum and market position
19% ARR growth and 27% total revenue growth demonstrating execution strength
